oneLiner: Secure, Immutable, and Auditable Azure-Native Forensic Evidence Storage

sections.title: Architecture
sections.content: VNet-isolated ADLS Gen2 storage with Private Endpoints and event-driven automation via Azure Functions.

sections.title: Immutability
sections.content: Enterprise-grade WORM policies with configurable time-based retention (365 days by default) and Legal Holds that preserve evidence until explicitly released.

sections.title: Chain of Custody
sections.content: Automated SHA-256 cryptographic hashing with immutable JSON receipts for a verifiable and defensible audit trail.

sections.title: Audit & Compliance
sections.content: 90-day Log Analytics retention, Defender for Storage malware detection, and seamless SIEM/Event Hub integration.

imagePrompt: A professional, clean, and minimal corporate infographic poster for 'Forensic Storage Lab'. The design features a central technical schematic of a cloud storage architecture with interconnected nodes representing 'WORM Immutability', 'SHA-256 Hashing', and 'Audit & Compliance'. Uses a palette of corporate blues (#2B6CB0), forest greens (#2F855A), and burnt orange accents (#C05621) on a light grey background (#F7FAFC). Minimalist flat design icons for locks, shields, and networks. Sharp, precise schematic lines connect the components, with plenty of white space and professional, bold typography.
animationPrompt: Subtle pulsing light following the schematic lines of the infographic. The icons for 'Immutability' and 'Audit & Compliance' gently glow. A slow, smooth pan across the technical details of the architecture, highlighting the 'SHA-256' and 'WORM' labels as they appear.
voiceoverScript: Welcome to the Forensic Storage Lab. This Azure-based solution ensures your forensic evidence remains immutable and auditable. From automated SHA-256 hashing to multi-tier lifecycle management and WORM protection, we provide a defensible chain of custody in the cloud.
